section: FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE GIFT DISCLOSURE WAIVER REQUEST
free_text:
**COMMITTEE ON ETHICS** — U.S. House of Representatives

_Received stamps:_ handwritten "FEB. 28" (with "APR" written above) and initials; "REF... / 2017 MAR ... / COMMITTEE ON ..." date stamp; rotated intake stamp "2018 FEB -7 AM 10:58 — LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES".

## FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE
## GIFT DISCLOSURE WAIVER REQUEST

This form should be used by any House Member, officer, or employee who is seeking a waiver of the reporting requirements under the Ethics in Government Act (EIGA) for gifts the individual received in connection with a wedding or engagement, the birth or adoption of a child, or a death in the family (5 U.S.C. app. § 102(a)(2)(A)). You must have already sought and received from the Committee a waiver of the House gift rule (House Rule 25, clause 5) for any such gifts. A House Member, officer, or employee who wishes to request a financial disclosure waiver under the EIGA for any other type of gift should contact the Ethics Committee at (202) 225-7103. Submit this form to the Ethics Committee's Office of Advice and Education in 1015 Longworth HOB. Once approved, this form will be returned to you, and a copy will be filed with the Clerk of the House for public disclosure.

**Name of Requester:** Ro Khanna   **Date:** 2/28/2017

**Signature of Requester:** _[signed]_

**Employing Member/Committee:** Ro Khanna, CA-17

**Office Address:** 513 Cannon HOB, Washington, DC 20515

**Telephone:** 202 225 2631

**Date gift rule waiver granted:** _[blank]_

**Occasion for which a gift rule waiver is requested (check one):**
- [ ] Wedding/engagement
- [X] Birth/adoption of child
- [ ] Death in family

**Date (or anticipated date) of occasion:** 7/15/2017

**Request Approved pursuant to 5 U.S.C. app. § 102(a)(2)(C):** _[signed]_ Susan W. Brooks, Chairwoman   **Date:** 3/3/17

_[signed]_ Theodore E. Deutch, Ranking Member

Copy to: Legislative Resource Center, 135 CHOB

_Last Updated 1/2017_

uncertainties.note: committee received date stamp partially illegible; only 'REF... 2017 MAR ... COMMITTEE ON ...' visible, day-of-month not readable
handwritten annotation at top; 'APR' written above 'FEB. 28', meaning unclear
